response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering background but lacks the core requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a bachelor thesis, far short of the required 5-10 years. There is no Windows-platform C++ work, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. The recent decade has been focused on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack work, which does not align with the mandatory technical or domain criteria.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with senior/staff-level roles
Solid fundamentals in testing, TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and in a low-level audio thesis project
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and over a decade old; no Windows C++ work
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No fixed income or capital markets domain knowledge
